name: Learn Codebase
description_en: A Socratic tutor that teaches codebase understanding through questioning, challenges, and active recall—useful when onboarding to a new codebase or deepening understanding of existing code—and maintains a learning journal that tracks mastery and schedules reviews.
description_zh: 一位苏格拉底式导师,通过提问、挑战与主动回忆来教你读懂代码库——适合上手新代码库或加深对现有代码的理解——并维护一份学习日志,跟踪掌握度并安排复习。
long_en: Treats codebase onboarding as spaced, recall-based learning rather than a one-off read-through, persisting progress between sessions.
long_zh: 把代码库上手当作基于间隔与回忆的学习,而非一次性通读,并在多次会话间持久化进度。
sec_note_en: Reads the codebase you point it at and keeps a local learning journal; analysis is read-only.
sec_note_zh: 读取你指定的代码库并在本地维护学习日志;分析为只读。
